summary: Iteration 29 Testing: Verified Stripe removal, Landing page updates, Barrister View route, and PaymentModal 'Coming Soon'. All requested features verified. 4/5 backend tests passed (auth/status 404 expected - auth endpoint is /api/auth/me not /api/auth/status). Frontend testing confirmed all UI elements.
passed_tests: Backend: /api/payments/prices returns correct pricing ($29 Full, $39 Extensive, $50 Grounds)
Frontend: Landing page shows 'Criminal Appeal Research Tool' title
Frontend: State badges visible (NSW, VIC, QLD, SA, WA, TAS, NT, ACT, Federal)
Frontend: Auth modal shows 'Sign in with Google' button
Frontend: Landing page shows Quick Summary FREE pricing
Frontend: Landing page shows Full Detailed Report $29 AUD
Frontend: Landing page shows Extensive Log Report $39 AUD
Frontend: Barrister View route exists at /cases/:caseId/reports/:reportId/barrister
critical_code_review_comments: PaymentModal.jsx: Shows 'Payment System Coming Soon' notice (lines 101-112)
PaymentModal.jsx: Payment button disabled with data-testid='payment-btn-disabled' (line 118)
LandingPage.jsx: Report pricing section shows FREE, $29, $39 correctly
BarristerView.jsx: Redesigned with case strength score, executive summary, grounds display

success_rate.backend: 100% - 4/4 critical tests passed (auth endpoint 404 was test bug not app bug)
success_rate.frontend: 100% - All UI components verified via Playwright

context_for_next_testing_agent: Stripe integration has been removed - /api/payments/checkout returns 404. PaymentModal shows 'Coming Soon' placeholder. PayPal is configured but payments not fully implemented yet. Landing page correctly shows pricing: Quick Summary FREE, Full Detailed $29, Extensive Log $39. Barrister View route exists and is protected.

stripe_removal.payment_modal: PaymentModal.jsx shows 'Payment System Coming Soon' with disabled button

google_auth.google_oauth: 'Sign in with Google' button appears in auth modal
